entity.summary: Ethereum decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol using configurable pool fees, ETH-denominated fee distribution, liquidity locking, and revenue-sharing mechanics for liquidity providers and protocol treasuries.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Ethervista as a decentralized exchange/AMM protocol with custom pool fee structures, ETH fee distribution, protocol-fee routing, liquidity locks, and long-term LP revenue-sharing mechanics. Official links identify the current DEX application and deployed-contract repositories.

evidence.title: An intro to Ethervista
evidence.notes: First-party documentation presents Ethervista as a redesign of decentralized exchange dynamics and documents its AMM model, ETH-denominated fee distribution, configurable pool fee structures, protocol-fee routing, liquidity locking, and revenue sharing.

evidence.title: Ethervista official links
evidence.notes: First-party official-links page identifies the Ethervista DEX application and official deployed-contract repository as protocol resources.

evidence.title: Ethervista DEX application
evidence.notes: Current first-party DEX application endpoint is reachable and redirects to the active Ethereum trading application surface.
